purpose: Capture a fresh row32 full-wire no-comment/max1400 native pair with row0 AF=NOP and rows1..31 AF blank so the max1400 scaling signal can be compared when the first row is structurally distinguished from the remaining rows

entries.label: grc32fwnop_no_comment_native_20260307
entries.description: row32 native full-wire row0-NOP no-comment control for max1400 carrier-dependence check

entries.label: grc32fwnop_max1400_native_20260307
entries.description: row32 native full-wire row0-NOP max1400 control using scratchpad/max1400_comment_body_20260307.txt

decision_target.carrier_dependent_hypothesis: the extra max1400 structure relies on empty logical rows as hidden carriers and will collapse or materially change when row0 is structurally distinguished with NOP and the ladder body remains fully wired
decision_target.carrier_independent_hypothesis: the extra max1400 structure is comment-owned extent metadata and will still allocate or preserve the scaling signature under full-wire geometry even when row0 carries NOP
